plot outline: The naked corpse of Captain Elisabeth Campbell, daughter of Lieutenant General "Fighting Joe" Campbell, is found staked out on the urban warfare range of Fort MacCallum. Army CID detectives and ex-lovers Paul Brenner and Sara Sunhill are called in to investigate, and find themselves wrapped up in a maelstrom of sexual impropriety and misguided face-saving.
title: The General's Daughter
akas: The General's Daughter: Elizabeth Campbell (Japan, English title)

production companies.name: MFP Munich Film Partners GmbH & Company I. Produktions KG
